title: stachys lusitanica
intro: Stachys lusitanica, also known as Woundwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stachys lusitanica include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Stachys lusitanica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
